title: Cobblemon LUX! [Fabric]
description:
LUX Cobblemon, a modpack including the namesake Cobblemon mod and all the Fabric Cobblemon modpack mods... along with many other small and large mods that help expand the vanilla experience!

Main Mods:
- Cobblemon
- Create
- Let's Do
- BetterX
body:
# Cobblemon LUX!
Cobblemon themed modpack with the intent to enhance the vanilla experience while offering multiple larger mods that have internal progression. Play Cobblemon, build machinery in Create, cook meals and brew drinks with Let's Do, explore the enhanced environments of Terralith, BetterX, and YUNG's structure mods.

This pack will stay on 1.20.1 until such a time that Cobblemon, Create, Let's Do, and BetterX are all updated to 1.21- additional mods may be added overtime, so long as they do not heavily conflict or overlap with the main mods of this pack (or Vanilla Minecraft itself).
## Content
**Main Mods**
- Cobblemon
	- Additional Cobblemon Spawn Compat
	- Cobbreeding
- Create
	- Big Cannons
	- Deco
	- Goggles
	- Copycats+
	- Interiors
	- Steam 'n' Rails
	- Structures

	- Brewery
	- Camping
	- Candlelight
	- Farm & Charm
